runners.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but swamped late when a close up fourth (22.92) at this track over 390m. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

runners.formComment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 4 lengths over 390m at Shepparton (22.54). Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.
